priscillawolf.note: RE-SCRAPED w/ renderPage.mjs (rendered). engine=work, multi (7). in_icp=FALSE — render revealed primary CTA is a 4-step on-site booking wizard (pkg -> studio&date -> details -> confirm; EUR 495/1495/2495 ALL-IN), not the /contact lead-form. Static scrape had wrongly recorded in_icp=true. Gaps: proposed_new booking-wizard (scheduling inventory); filterable portfolio has no canonical section.

morenoshairandbeauty.note: engine=place (runner-up work), multi (6), full capture. Gaps: proposed_new external-booking-redirect (Treatwell/Optios, no on-site form); unmapped in-salon retail catalog w/ discount tiers; careers/chair-rental sub-tree = second non-conversion audience.

coltivar.note: RE-SCRAPED w/ renderPage.mjs (rendered). engine=trust (runner-up thing), multi (6 of ~10 nav captured; Kajabi). Gaps: proposed_new interactive-calculators (13 live tools), media-hub (podcast/YouTube); /schedule-your-call is a single-step calendar = delegated form, explicitly NOT booking-wizard (no inventory/multi-step). Multi-funnel strain mild (one_action=book-a-call); standalone health-check quiz inexpressible. Residual: 4 nav pages uncrawled.

greenhealthycooking.note: engine=work (runner-up quick-yes), multi (21). in_icp=FALSE — content publisher, 4 parallel funnels (email, ThriveCart course, ebooks, Amazon affiliate). Prices/embeds/meta null = under-captured (pre-render scrape). Gaps: proposed_new recipe-index, affiliate-hub; content-hub/blog inexpressible.

epiclaunch.note: engine=work (runner-up quick-yes), multi (5). in_icp=FALSE — personal content blog, not one-conversion. Gaps: proposed_new content-feed, affiliate-list; category/taxonomy nav has no canonical section.

runnersconnect.note: engine=thing (runner-up trust), multi (5 of 25). First 'thing' engine — productized coaching subscription w/ tiered pricing. Multi-goal (free email magnet vs paid sub vs contact) strains one_action. Gaps: proposed_new external email-capture popup (monstercampaigns), blog-teaser; interactive goal-selector toggle no canonical fit.

petsittersireland.note: engine=trust (runner-up thing), multi (5 of ~20). Real booking conversion sits in a login-gated portal invisible to crawl. Gaps: proposed_new booking-portal (login-gated stateful booking — distinct from booking-wizard + external-booking-redirect); awards-streak authority proof; no canonical office-hours/contact section; multi parallel conversions.

juliedawnfox.note: engine=trust (runner-up thing), multi (6). in_icp=FALSE — three parallel funnels (Calendly consult + ConvertKit newsletter + WooCommerce checkout). fetch_quality=rendered (contact page revealed hidden ConvertKit opt-in). Gaps: WooCommerce multi-SKU catalog+checkout no canonical section/engine; blog/content-funnel not a first-class engine; Google-reviews widget + award logos collapse two proofs into one socialProof.

olyvia.note: engine=trust (runner-up quick-yes), multi (4). in_icp=true (analyzer judged the ConvertKit opt-in a single valid action) but flagged multi-goal friction (subscribe + Gumroad redirect + affiliate) + legacy/unmaintained ~2017 blog. Gaps: affiliate resource directory no fit; homepage blog-feed no section id; virtual office-hours unmapped.

contractseries.note: engine=work (runner-up quick-yes), multi (Wix ~12, 5 crawled). fetch_quality=partial — all pages rendered; /books stayed shell-only, contact form is unreadable iframe. Gaps: no engine/section for author bibliography of purchasable novels; split conversion (external-store redirect + newsletter) two co-equal goals; no capability for off-site book/product listings.
